calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motin For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY 415/551-9544, appearing for petitioner

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of The State of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions and Striking Claim is granted. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. Not reported.

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
